# Why Python for Synthetic Biology?

## Draft focus

This chapter should make the case that synthetic biology is already computational, even when the researcher thinks of themselves as mostly experimental.

## Topics to cover

- the computational shape of modern synbio
- scripts versus software
- why Python is a strong bridge language
- the importance of open-source tooling and reproducibility

## Starter example

```{python}
from collections import Counter

sequence = "ATGATCGGCTTACGAT"
Counter(sequence)
```

## Draft note

Use this chapter to set the tone for the rest of the book. The goal is motivation, not maximal technical depth.
